## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --release`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] ROM-backed oracle tests, if relevant
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGES.md` updated, if relevant
- [ ] No ROMs, extracted game assets, secrets, binaries, or run artifacts added

## Compatibility

Describe any public API, Gymnasium contract, checkpoint, saved-state, platform,
or performance impact. Write `None` when there is no such impact.
